text: Preserve attributable budget drafting, activation, and revision history without rewriting prior intent. Evidence [analogous]: LEDGER already requires attributable immutable financial correction history, and BUDGET applies the same auditability principle to owner intent. Actor/workflow trace: P1 through UC-BUDGET-001, UC-BUDGET-002, and UC-BUDGET-004. Requirement trace: FR-BUDGET-PLAN-DRAFT, FR-BUDGET-PLAN-ACTIVATION, FR-BUDGET-PLAN-HISTORY, and FR-BUDGET-IDEMPOTENT-MUTATIONS.
target: Activation is explicit; every change creates a new immutable Budget Plan Revision with owner, reason, and timestamp; all prior revisions remain inspectable and no draft silently changes the active plan.
